com.github.copilot.rpc.PermissionRequestResultKind

Package
Description
com.github.copilot.rpc
Configuration classes and data transfer objects for the Copilot SDK.

  • Uses of PermissionRequestResultKind in com.github.copilot.rpc

    Fields in com.github.copilot.rpc declared as PermissionRequestResultKind
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PermissionRequestResultKind
    PermissionRequestResultKind.APPROVED
    The permission was approved for this one instance.
    static final PermissionRequestResultKind
    PermissionRequestResultKind.DENIED_BY_RULES
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionRequestResultKind.USER_NOT_AVAILABLE instead.
    static final PermissionRequestResultKind
    PermissionRequestResultKind.DENIED_COULD_NOT_REQUEST_FROM_USER
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionRequestResultKind.USER_NOT_AVAILABLE instead.
    static final PermissionRequestResultKind
    PermissionRequestResultKind.DENIED_INTERACTIVELY_BY_USER
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionRequestResultKind.REJECTED instead.
    static final PermissionRequestResultKind
    PermissionRequestResultKind.NO_RESULT
    Leaves the pending permission request unanswered.
    static final PermissionRequestResultKind
    PermissionRequestResultKind.REJECTED
    The permission was denied interactively by the user.
    static final PermissionRequestResultKind
    PermissionRequestResultKind.USER_NOT_AVAILABLE
    The permission was denied because user confirmation was unavailable.
    Methods in com.github.copilot.rpc with parameters of type PermissionRequestResultKind
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PermissionRequestResult
    PermissionRequestResult.setKind(PermissionRequestResultKind kind)
    Sets the result kind using a PermissionRequestResultKind value.
